ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Aug-30-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-02-2022 Continued To Aug-30-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. An Order to Appear will be issued to Personal Representative Beth M. Hansen and Attorney John P. McGrath to appear on Aug-30-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Kahler. Not Reported.
Off Calendar Jun-28-2022 Continued To Aug-02-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Nov-16-2021 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-29-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas Cain appeared by zoom for Beth Hansen (Petitioner).

The Court stated that this matter is on calendar to inquire as to whether anyone would be showing up to object. The Court noted that no one is objecting and waives any defect in notice. The Petition for Letters of Administration is under submission. Status on close of estate is set for June 28, 2022 at 9:00a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Loo. Not reported.
